title: Text not wrapping around image due to CSS settings
symptom: Text does not wrap around the image as expected when using float CSS. The layout appears broken.
applies_when: Using custom CSS to style text and images
Image is placed within a parent div
not_this_if: Using default CSS settings without custom modifications
root_cause: The float property needs to be applied to the parent div of the image, not the image itself. Additionally, the parent div must be set to display: block instead of flex to allow proper text wrapping.
fix_steps: Locate the parent div of the image in your HTML structure.
Add 'float: left;' or 'float: right;' to the parent div's CSS.
Ensure the parent div has 'display: block;' set.
Save the changes and refresh the page to see the effect.
agent_instruction: Apply float CSS to the image's parent div and set it to display: block.
